environment.uname: Linux c61d96076369 6.8.0-45-generic #45~22.04.1-Ubuntu SMP PREEMPT_DYNAMIC Wed Sep 11 15:25:05 UTC 2 x86_64 x86_64 x86_64 GNU/Linux

purpose: Embree vs OptiX/RT baseline across promoted benchmark apps before Triton/Numba partner work.

rows.notes: Scaled synthetic RayDB-style grouped aggregate; primary metric is the generic grouped-reduction query phase.

metadata.claim_boundary: Embree parity for count/sum over the synthetic RayDB-style columnar aggregate contract. This uses existing generic columnar payload capability through direct record-set preparation; it does not add native RayDB ABI, reproduce RayDB, or authorize performance wording.

lowering_plan.claim_boundary: Native count/sum parity only. The path avoids Python row-mapping materialization and can reuse matching typed host buffers, but it still may stage unsupported columns and does not authorize min/max support, true zero-copy, public speedup, or whole-app wording.

runs.stdout_tail:
{
  "app": "raydb_style_columnar_aggregate",
  "backend": "embree",
  "copies": 120000,
  "elapsed_sec": 2.115998223889619,
  "matches_cpu_reference": true,
  "metadata": {
    "authors_code_comparison": false,
    "claim_boundary": "Embree parity for count/sum over the synthetic RayDB-style columnar aggregate contract. This uses existing generic columnar payload capability through direct record-set preparation; it does not add native RayDB ABI, reproduce RayDB, or authorize performance wording.",
    "columnar_preparation": {
      "all_numeric_columns_use_typed_host_buffers": false,
      "copied_column_count": 6,
      "copied_columns": [
        "row_id",
        "region_id",
        "ship_year",
        "discount",
        "quantity",
        "revenue"
      ],
      "native_abi_added": false,
      "text_encoded_column_count": 0,
      "text_encoded_columns": [],
      "transfer_path": "direct_columnar_record_set_to_columnar_payload",
      "true_zero_copy_authorized": false,
      "typed_host_buffer_column_count": 0,
      "typed_host_buffer_columns": []
    },
    "contract": "columnar_grouped_aggregate_embree_columnar_payload",
    "copies": 120000,
    "direct_columnar_record_set_api": true,
    "fixture": "tiny_denormalized_columnar",
    "lowering_plan": {
      "backend": "embree",
      "claim_boundary": "Native count/sum parity only. The path avoids Python row-mapping materialization and can reuse matching typed host buffers, but it still may stage unsupported columns and does not authorize min/max support, true zero-copy, public speedup, or whole-app wording.",
      "direct_columnar_record_set_api": true,
      "materializes_input_rows_for_wrapper": false,
      "next_engine_target": "optix_partner_resident_columnar_payload_native_execution",
      "requires_runtime_validation": true,
      "supported_aggregates": [
        "count",
        "sum"
      ],
      "transfer_path": "direct_columnar_record_set_to_columnar_payload",
      "true_zero_copy_authorized": false,
      "unsupported_aggregates": [
        "min",
        "max",
        "avg_as_sum_count"
      ],
      "uses_compatibility_wrapper": false
    },
    "materializes_input_rows_for_wrapper": false,
    "native_abi_added": false,
    "paper_reproduction": false,
    "row_count": 960000,
    "rt_core_accelerated": false,
    "timings": {
      "elapsed_sec": 2.115998223889619,

      "query_sec": 0.18884597485885024
    },
    "uses_existing_compatibility_wrapper": false
  },
  "mode": "count",
  "row_count": 960000,
